records.ety: [Cf. F. dsorganisation. See Disorganize, v. t.]

defs: The act of disorganizing; destruction of system.
The state of being disorganized; as, the disorganization of the body, or of government.
quotes: The magazine of a pawnbroker in such total disorganization, that the owner can never lay his hands upon any one article at the moment he has occasion for it.
